arts.ttl: Real Madrid consider re-signing club legend in time for Champions League clash against Liverpool
arts.sum: Amid a crisis in central defence, Real Madrid are considering a move to re-sign Sergio Ramos on a deal until the end of the season. On Saturday, Real Madrid were left devastated by the news that Eder Militao has ruptured his anterior cruciate ligament for the second time in 15 months. arts.ttl: I would sign one player for Liverpool from the Aston Villa squad
arts.sum: Glen Johnson has named the Aston Villa man he would like to see in the red of Liverpool ahead of tonight's Anfield meeting between the teams.

arts.ttl: Brentford eyeing up move for £25m-rated Celtic attacker as replacement for Liverpool-linked Bryan Mbeumo
arts.sum: Brentford are keen on a move for Celtic winger Nicolas Kuhn, as they consider options amid strong interest in Bryan Mbeumo. arts.ttl: Former Liverpool star announces retirement at the age of 37 more than a year after his last professional game
arts.sum: The 69-time Netherlands international last played for Turkish side Eyupspor in 2023 following spells at Anfield, Ajax, Fulham and Galatasaray among others.

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Aston Villa LIVE match updates and team news from Anfield
arts.sum: This will be Liverpool's 100th home game versus Villa in all competitions and have won 62 times, losing 17. Their manager Arne Slot has made the best start by any Premier League manager in history, with 14 wins from 16 competitive games in charge.
